return(function(a,u,x,Z,N,g,f,E,Q,e,V,P,F,R,W,q,y,T,j,p,C,D,K)V,D,F,Q,R,q,P,T,W,j,y,K,p,E,e,C={},function(a,r)local u=W(r)local x=function()return K(a,{},r,u)end return x x end return(C(8656291-924984,{}))(u(f))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[r(915075+-932755)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
